task_completion.description: Configure custom paper size (5x7 inches) and 0.5-inch margins
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document page should appear proportionally like a 5x7 card (slightly less elongated than standard Letter size). The rulers should indicate a 5-inch width and 7-inch height, and the text should start 0.5 inches from the edges. Alternatively, the Page Setup dialog box showing these exact measurements.

task_completion.description: Add a black or dark blue box page border
task_completion.visual_evidence: A solid black or dark blue line forming a complete box around the perimeter of the page.

task_completion.description: Insert a gold or yellow 5-point star at the top
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 5-point star shape colored gold or yellow positioned at the top of the document, above the text.

task_completion.description: Enter required text and center it horizontally
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document contains the exact text: 'SAVE THE DATE', 'Summit Innovations', '10th Anniversary Gala', 'Saturday, October 12, 2024', '7:00 PM', 'The Grand Ballroom', and 'Downtown Hilton'. All lines of text must be horizontally centered on the page.

task_completion.description: Apply specific font sizes, bolding, and center vertical alignment
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'SAVE THE DATE' and '10th Anniversary Gala' are visibly bolded and larger than the rest of the text. The entire block of text should be vertically centered between the top and bottom margins of the page (equal empty space above and below the text block).

task_completion.description: Save the document as invitation.docx in the Documents folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Word title bar displays 'invitation.docx' or 'invitation - Microsoft Word', or a Save As dialog shows the file being saved to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\invitation.docx.

integrity.description: The agent used Microsoft Word 2010 to create the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Microsoft Word 2010 interface (ribbon, workspace) being actively used, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to generate the docx file
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent opening a terminal/command prompt and running Python scripts (e.g., using python-docx) to bypass GUI interaction.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Word ribbon to apply formatting and shapes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture the agent clicking through the 'Page Layout', 'Insert', and 'Home' tabs to set margins, insert the star shape, apply borders, and format text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires a 5x7 inch document (width: 5 inches, height: 7 inches) with 0.5-inch margins on all sides. The file must be saved exactly as 'invitation.docx'. Required text includes 'SAVE THE DATE', 'Summit Innovations', '10th Anniversary Gala', and 'Saturday, October 12, 2024'.
